title: Connective Spine — Identity Record (v0.1)
description: Every object a connector emits. Identity is a RECORD, not one key. MUST carry source, sourceLocalId, projectKey, and at least one join key.

source.description: Connector/source id, e.g. clashcontrol, pdra, erpnext, bcf.

sourceLocalId.description: The source's own id for this object.

projectKey.description: Shared, source-agnostic project id (reconciled across sources).

ifcGuid.description: IFC GlobalId — joins model-derived sources only.

uniqueId.description: Revit UniqueId — the stable cross-tool model key (primary).

modelInstanceId.description: Which model instance/revision this came from (for cross-bridge consistency).

classification.description: One or more {system, code} — the non-GUID join to finance/contracts.

zone.description: Spatial zone; id MUST be unique within projectKey.
